title: NPM access tokens should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: NPM access token detected (npm_ prefix). NPM access tokens provide authentication to publish packages, access private registries, and manage npm account operations. Exposing these tokens allows attackers to publish malicious packages under your account, access private packages, modify published versions, steal proprietary code, and compromise the entire npm ecosystem. Store tokens securely in environment variables and rotate immediately if exposed.

NPM authentication token detected in .npmrc format. Registry authentication tokens in .npmrc configuration files grant full access to npm package operations. Exposing these tokens enables attackers to authenticate as you, publish packages with your credentials, download private packages, and potentially inject malicious code into the software supply chain. Use npm login or environment variables instead of hardcoding tokens.

NPM token variable detected in configuration. Hardcoded NPM tokens in variable assignments provide direct registry access credentials. Exposing these tokens allows unauthorized package publishing, access to private registries, modification of package metadata, and potential supply chain attacks. Always use environment variables or npm's built-in credential management.

UUID-format NPM token detected. Legacy NPM tokens use UUID format for authentication. These tokens provide the same level of access as modern tokens, allowing package publishing, private registry access, and account operations. Exposed UUID tokens can be abused for supply chain attacks, unauthorized package modifications, and data exfiltration. Migrate to modern token formats and use secure storage.
